narrative:
Green H (precinct in Hamilton County) has 819 registered voters, with 57.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.0%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.8 percentage points.
